title: Rainbow Shields
description: Shows your pride flag on your shield! 🏳️‍🌈
body:
# Rainbow Shields

**Hi!**

This pack requires **OptiFine** to work and allows you to display one of **50 pride flags** on your shield.

<details>
<summary>Take your shield to the anvil and rename it to:</summary>

|---------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
|---------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| 1978 Gay Shield                             | Gay Man Shield                               |
| 1979 Gay Shield                             | Lesbian Shield                               |
| Gay Shield                                  | Bisexual Shield                              |
| Inclusive Shield                            | Drag Shield                                  |
| Progressive Shield                          | Straight Ally Shield                         |
|---------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| Pansexual Shield                            | Sapphic Shield                               |
| Panromantic Shield                          | Achillean Shield                             |
| Polysexual Shield                           | Diamoric Shield                              |
| Abrosexual Shield                           | Polyamory Shield                             |
| Omnisexual Shield                           | New Polyamory Shield                         |
|---------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| Transgender Shield                          | Bigender Shield                              |
| Transfeminine Shield                        | Intergender Shield                           |
| Transmasculine Shield                       | Intersex Shield                              |
| Demigirl Shield                             | Nonbinary Shield                             |
| Demiboy Shield                              | Deminonbinary Shield                         |
|---------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| Agender Shield                              | Pangender Shield                             |
| Neutrois Shield                             | Polygender Shield                            |
| Genderqueer Shield                          | Genderfluid Shield                           |
| Anthrosexual Shield                         | Genderflux Shield                            |
| Androgyne Shield                            | Queer Shield                                 |
|---------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| Asexual Shield                              | Aromantic Shield                             |
| Demisexual Shield                           | Demiromantic Shield                          |
| Greysexual Shield                           | Greyromantic Shield                          |
| Cupiosexual Shield                          | Cupioromantic Shield                         |
| Aroace Shield                               | Unlabeled Shield                             |

</details>


Check out images to pick your flag and have fun!

<hr>

![Orientations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2b016f8ee8047be6a64b020c47c52f37d05d908.png)
![Orientations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d78f9807bc2a8aab7e83fffad50088454c510740.png)
![Genders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00ed5baa80eb3b538a3d30c79152c71c0981ba9f.png)
![Genders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cad0925ea9aad8ecd269223350ec320a40683d85.png)
![Aroaces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7bc2baf0bc0e94143a5592aed79bb04240b8410.png)

<hr>

**Hope you like it!**
